The Molecular Sciences Institute - Summer Internship 2003
MSI Home2003 InternshipBiosFieldtripsPhoto Gallery

The Molecular Sciences Institute Summer High School Internship 2003 was a success! Our four high school interns: Scott Coyle, Jermaine Deckard, Jeremy Gordon, and Tyra Mcray, represented three different high schools this year: Grenada High School, John F. Kennedy High School, and Berkeley High School.

The interns worked side-by-side with one or two staff scientists on both the computer side and in MSI's wetlab for 8 weeks during the summer. The interns also visited a variety of locations around the bay area including Walnut Creek's Joint Genome Institute, UC Berkeley's Electron Microscopy Lab, and the Keasling Lab.

The Molecular Sciences Institute
2168 Shattuck Avenue, Berkeley CA 94704 (tel) 510-647-0690
